# VAT Module

The VAT module estimates potential VAT revenue under the current policy structure and under alternative reform scenarios.

## Main data sources

The VAT module may use:

- Supply and Use Tables;
- Input-Output Tables;
- household final consumption;
- government final consumption;
- NPISH final consumption;
- intermediate consumption;
- gross fixed capital formation;
- VAT revenue data;
- VAT policy rates and exemptions.

## Example VAT results

```{r}
vat_table
```

## VAT revenue chart

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
vat_chart
```

## Methodological note

The VAT revenue impact can be calculated as:

```{r}
vat_revenue_change <- sum(tax_results$revenue_simulation - tax_results$revenue_baseline)

vat_revenue_change
```
